codeReview.summary: The feature commit adds a single focused test file (`tests/startrun-branches.test.ts`) that covers the four requested `startRun` terminal/no-runnable branches: already-completed session fail path, all-features-completed completion path, no-runnable-feature blocked path, and invalid requested id fail-without-blocking path. Assertions align with the feature description and expected behavior.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill context, and commit diff for `m2-startrun-branches` (commit `4b75993`). Coverage is implemented via targeted tests only, with no runtime changes required, and no blocking or non-blocking defects were identified for this feature scope.
